title: Alpha Squad (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Alpha}}
'''Alpha Squad''' or '''Alpha Squadron''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Alpha Squadron (TIE/IN interceptor)|Alpha Squadron]]''', a [[TIE/IN interceptor]] unit

==Legends==
*'''[[Alpha Squad (Quesh)|Alpha Squad]]''', a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] unit on [[Quesh]]
*'''[[Alpha Squad (Tatooine)|Alpha Squad]]''', a Sith Empire unit on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''[[Alpha Squad (Zann)|Alpha Squad]]''', a [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] unit
*'''[[Alpha Squad (Galactic Republic)|Alpha Squad]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] unit
*'''[[Alpha Squadron]]''', an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] unit
*'''[[Alpha Squadron (TIE/IN interceptor)|Alpha Squadron]]''' of the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]]
*'''[[Alpha Squadron (TIE/D Defender)|Alpha Squadron]]''', a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter|Tie/d Defender]] unit
*'''[[Alpha Squadron (seatrooper)|Alpha Squadron]]''', an [[aquatic assault stormtrooper]] unit

{{Disambig}}
